Practical handling, preparation, and monitoring notes — sourcing, side-effect management, bloodwork markers, and post-cycle protocols.

Research use only — educational information. This is a reorganized compound reference for research scientists and educators. It is not medical advice and not a solicitation to purchase any substance. Many compounds listed are prescription-only, controlled, and/or carry serious health risks. Consult qualified professionals, obtain appropriate bloodwork, and understand the laws that apply to you before acting on anything here.
